name: hanako-runtime-learner
description: Runtime self-learning engine for Hanako: observe local interaction patterns, learn repeated workflows and errors, inject conservative skill hints.
author: Sun

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/common.js && node --check lib/helpers.js && node --check lib/hana-runtime-compat.js && node --check lib/official-utility-model.js && node --check lib/model-advisor.js && node --check lib/official-memory-bridge.js && node --check lib/pattern-detector.js && node --check lib/observer.js && node --check lib/proposals.js && node --check lib/session-turn.js && node --check tools/stats.js && node --check tools/report.js && node --check tools/control.js && node --check tools/activity.js && node --check tools/open-dir.js && node --check tools/search.js
scripts.test: node --test tests/common.test.js tests/proposals.test.js tests/official-memory-bridge.test.js tests/pattern-detector.test.js tests/flush-turn.test.js tests/observer.test.js tests/model-advisor.test.js
